chapters.title: All 16 Chapters
chapters.sub: From zero to a professional trading framework. Work through in order.
calc.title: Professional Calculators
calc.sub: Five calculators every serious trader uses. Share to WhatsApp in one tap.
live.title: Live Markets
ch01.intro: Before charts, candles, or strategies — understand what trading is. Not gambling. Not luck. A business of probabilities.
ch01.def.title: Trading in Plain English
ch01.def.body: Buying an asset at one price and selling at a higher price — or selling first and buying back cheaper (shorting). You profit on the difference. In forex, you bet on one currency strengthening or weakening against another.
ch01.truth.title: The Core Truth
ch01.truth.body: 95% of retail traders lose — not because trading is impossible, but because they trade without a system. The market isn't random. Institutions control it. Understanding their behaviour is the edge.
ch02.intro: 4 major financial markets. Knowing which one to trade determines your edge before you even open a chart.
ch03.intro: Forex is open 24/5 but not all hours are equal. Trading in the wrong session is fishing in a dry lake.
ch04.intro: The single most important skill in trading. Before any entry, you must read the trend. Structure tells you the story of what price is doing.
ch05.intro: Not all price levels are equal. Support and resistance zones are where the market repeatedly makes decisions. These are your entry zones.
ch06.intro: Candlesticks are the language price speaks. Learn it and the chart tells you exactly what is happening between buyers and sellers.
ch07.intro: Patterns are footprints of institutional behaviour. They repeat because human psychology and institutional mechanics don't change.
ch08.intro: Institutions don't trade like retail traders. They manipulate price to hunt your stop losses before making the real move. Understanding this changes everything.
ch09.intro: This is not optional. This is why 95% lose. You can have the best strategy in the world and blow your account without this.
ch10.intro: Your biggest enemy in trading isn't the market. It's your brain. Emotions like fear, greed, and FOMO cause more losses than any bad strategy.
ch11.intro: Everything you've learned, distilled into a repeatable step-by-step entry system. This is your playbook.
ch12.intro: Knowledge without action is nothing. Here is the exact path from where you are now to consistent profitability.
ch13.intro: Options are the most powerful financial instruments available to retail traders — and the most misunderstood. Master these and you control risk like an institution.
ch14.intro: Every pip that moves in forex, every tick in gold, every point on the Nifty — ultimately traces back to macro forces. Understanding them gives you an edge no indicator can provide.
ch15.intro: Algorithmic trading isn't just for hedge funds. Understanding these concepts makes you a sharper manual trader and opens the door to automating your edge entirely.
ch16.intro: You've mastered the craft. Now it's time to scale it. Proprietary trading firms will fund your account — up to $200,000 — if you can prove your edge.
